name: create_embedding
description: Generate vector embeddings for input text. Embeddings are numerical representations of text that capture semantic meaning, useful for search, clustering, recommendations, anomaly detection, and classification. Returns a list of embedding vectors, one per input.

parameters.name: input
parameters.description: The text to embed. Can be a single string or an array of strings (max 8192 tokens per input for text-embedding-3 models).

parameters.name: encoding_format
parameters.description: Format of the embedding vector: 'float' (default) or 'base64'.

parameters.name: dimensions
parameters.description: Number of dimensions for the output embedding (only for text-embedding-3 models). Lower dimensions reduce storage cost.

body.input: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog
